title: Pristar Remote Control Car Hand Gesture Controlled Car, 1:14 RC Stunt Auto 360° Rotation 3 Control Methods 2.4 GHz Drift Glove Controlled Cars Gift Toy for Kids Boy Girls Age 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12
features: 3 Remote Control Modes Hand Gesture Controlled Car, The latest upgraded version remote control car features lights and realistic music sound effects, spray and is equipped with 3 remote control modes, normal 2.4Ghz remote control and glove control and gesture control. Kids can remote control toy car and switch to turning, forward and backward movement, rotation, turning and automatic demonstration modes. The remote control of various stunt combinations is definitely an exciting experience.

Rear Spray & Light Design Hand Remote Control Car, There is a cool light spray system at the rear of the remote control rc stunt car. After adding water, and it will immediately produce steam, just like a real car is starting the engine under the light effect of the taillights. The four wheels of the car toy are equipped with LED lights that change colors. The colorful light effects of the remote-controlled stunt car are mysterious and attract children's attention.

Remote Control Cars For Boys Age 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12, The unique bionic spine design allows the RC stunt car with remote control to freely switch between road and off-road modes on different terrains, highways, grasslands, sandy areas, mountain roads compatible, giving you an excellent outdoor racing experience. The unique four-wheel drive RC car can move forward and backward at will, turn and avoid various obstacles excellently.

2 Battery Run for 60 minutes, The RC drift stunt hand controlled car car is equipped with two rechargeable 500 mAh batteries and a USB charger. The hand controlled car driving time extends to over 60 minutes, so kids can have uninterrupted fun with the remote control. The hand controlled stunt car 4wd rc drift car solid body material makes the drift electric car crash-proof and allows stunt combinations full of fun possibilities. Halloween Christmas New Year Present.

Present Gift for boys aged 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12years, If you're looking for an exciting and cool present gift for children kids, this remote-controlled spray car in the unique style of the Pristar brand is an ideal present for your child. Unique look of the remote control car and various driving stuntsThis is the perfect birthday and Christmas present gift for kids who love remote control radio controlled car toys. Remote control car, suitable for 4 5 6 8 10 years children.
